scripts.build: pnpm --filter feasibility-core build && vite build && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/codex-wrangler XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp/codex-wrangler-cache wrangler deploy --dry-run && node validate.mjs
scripts.typecheck: node --check worker.mjs && node --check evaluator.mjs && node --check playground.mjs && node --check scenario.mjs && node --check validate.mjs && node --check playwright.config.mjs && node --check e2e/helpers.mjs && node --check e2e/playground.spec.mjs
